name: pdf-tools-mcp
description: Lightweight local PDF tools for MCP-compatible AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Small local PDF operations for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: PDF Tools MCP exposes lightweight local PDF commands for inspecting, merging, splitting, extracting, deleting, rotating, reordering, and encrypting PDF files. It can be installed as a Codex plugin or used directly as a stdio MCP server by compatible clients.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this PDF and tell me how many pages it has.
Merge these PDFs into one file.
